ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the student is enrolled in */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic advisor assigned to the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("advisor_id") REFERENCES advisors ("advisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "program" TEXT /* Program under which the class falls */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours for the class */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance assessment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student being assessed */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class for which the assessment is made */,
  "appearance" INTEGER /* Score for general appearance */,
  "manner_of_speaking" INTEGER /* Score for manner of speaking */,
  "physical_condition" INTEGER /* Score for physical condition */,
  "mental_alertness" INTEGER /* Score for mental alertness */,
  "self_confidence" INTEGER /* Score for self-confidence */,
  "presentation_ability" INTEGER /* Score for ability to present ideas */,
  "communication_skills" INTEGER /* Score for communication skills */,
  "performance_rating" TEXT /* Overall performance rating (e.g., Employable, Less Employable) */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_assessments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_assessments_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance assessment related to the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text containing the feedback comments */,
  "date_given" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was given */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor providing the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES performance_assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the instructor belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advisors" (
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advisor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the advisor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the advisor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the advisor belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Instructor, Admin, Student) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student whose history is recorded */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment related to this history entry */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_history_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_history_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES performance_assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend analysis entry */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the trend analysis was performed */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the observed trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "career_readiness" (
  "readiness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each career readiness assessment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student being assessed */,
  "career_readiness_status" TEXT /* Status of the student's career readiness (e.g., Ready, Not Ready) */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the readiness assessment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readiness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_career_readiness_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
